reason: Sustained institutional ETF inflows for Bitcoin, coupled with a broad crypto market rally driven by easing macroeconomic fears, indicate strong upward momentum. Bitcoin has broken key psychological resistance at $72,000, signaling further price discovery. However, the inherent volatility of the crypto market and ongoing regulatory discussions (e.g., stablecoin fight) present elevated risk.
headlines: Ether, solana, xrp surge 8% as crypto markets rally on easing war fears
Quant firm suggests a bullish bitcoin trade with a key financing twist
Bitcoin tops $72,000 as ETFs pull $155 million, extending two week inflow streak
Sky token jumps 10% after governance vote causes bullish tilt in market dynamics
Eric Trump, World Liberty co-founder, calls banks 'anti-American' over stablecoin fight
